zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys於大約1140年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales18歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis10歲。她和William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais至少有4個兒子。她去世於1226年8月在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安代洛享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys was born about 1140, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, was 18 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, was 10. She had at least 4 sons with William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais. She died in August 1226, in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys est née environ 1140, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, avait 10 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais. Elle est décédée en août 1226, à Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys um 1140 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales 18 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis 10. Sie hatte mit William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb im August 1226 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys è nata il circa 1140 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, aveva 10 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais. Morì nel agosto 1226, nel Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhysが約1140年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Walesは18歳，母Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powisは10歳であった。彼女はWilliam Fitz Martin Lord of Cemaisとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1226年8月にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデイロで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 8월 웨일스 카마테실르 랜데이로에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tinha 10 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1226, em Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys родилась около 1140 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, 10. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais. Она умерла август 1226 г. в местности лландилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad Ankaret ferch Rhys nació aproximadamente 1140, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys ap Gruffydd Prince of South Wales, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Madoc of Powis, tenía 10 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con William Fitz Martin Lord of Cemais. Murió en agosto de 1226, en Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 87 años.
